name: langfuse-observability
description: The Langfuse x Claude Code Observability Plugin

LANGFUSE_BASE_URL.title: Langfuse Base URL
LANGFUSE_BASE_URL.description: Langfuse host. Use https://us.cloud.langfuse.com for US, https://cloud.langfuse.com for EU, or your self-hosted URL.

LANGFUSE_USER_ID.title: User ID
LANGFUSE_USER_ID.description: Optional user identifier attached to every trace (shown as the user in Langfuse). Leave empty to omit.

CC_LANGFUSE_MAX_CHARS.title: Max characters per field
CC_LANGFUSE_MAX_CHARS.description: Truncate captured inputs/outputs to this many characters

CC_LANGFUSE_SKILL_TAGS.title: Tag traces with skills
CC_LANGFUSE_SKILL_TAGS.description: Add a skill:<name> tag to traces for every skill invoked in the turn

CC_LANGFUSE_CAPTURE_SKILL_CONTENT.title: Capture skill instructions
CC_LANGFUSE_CAPTURE_SKILL_CONTENT.description: Include the injected skill instruction text in the Skill tool span output
